{
  "judge_id": "autogen-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.2": 4, "R1.4": 4, "RX.1": 4, "RX.3": 4, "RX.4": 4, "RX.5": 3},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent identifies and addresses multiple logical inconsistencies in the original text, such as the independence assumption of per-axis rates and the omission of the per-axis breakdown.",
    "R1.4": "The agent provides a detailed comparison with existing literature, noting that slice-based evaluation is standard outside transit science, which adds novelty context.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags several areas where confidence or evidence may be lacking, such as the independence check and the specific pipelines used.",
    "RX.3": "The agent covers the agreed-upon active set without significant drift, providing a comprehensive revision that adheres to the scope.",
    "RX.4": "The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content while making substantial changes to improve clarity and accuracy.",
    "RX.5": "While the agent provides detailed notes on areas of uncertainty, it does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies and addresses multiple logical inconsistencies in the original text, such as the independence assumption of per-axis rates and the omission of the per-axis breakdown.
rationale.R1.4: The agent provides a detailed comparison with existing literature, noting that slice-based evaluation is standard outside transit science, which adds novelty context.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags several areas where confidence or evidence may be lacking, such as the independence check and the specific pipelines used.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers the agreed-upon active set without significant drift, providing a comprehensive revision that adheres to the scope.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content while making substantial changes to improve clarity and accuracy.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent provides detailed notes on areas of uncertainty, it does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
